description: ABA steel pairing. Corviknight is a steel that doesn't lose to ground (unlike most steels), while Magnezone provides traditional steel coverage in the back. Creator explicitly says Corviknight must be paired with another steel type.

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Fantasy Cup | Great League | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Nearly perfect core even in open Great League — these two cover each other's weaknesses extremely well with complementary typings.

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS for the FANTASY CUP and the ULTRA LEAGUE in POKEMON GO!

description: ABB bait-trap core. Stunfisk safe-swaps to draw out Empoleon's counters (fighters and fire types), leaving Empoleon free to sweep in the back with shields. Both are steel types that cover different matchups.

sources.author: YasserPoGO
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS in the Fantasy Cup | Great League | Pokemon GO PvP

description: Unbreakable core — nothing in the Fantasy Cup meta core breaks this pairing in the 1-shield scenario. Complementary water/steel and fire/dragon typings.

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS for the FANTASY CUP and the ULTRA LEAGUE in POKEMON GO!

description: Giratina Origin is the most neutral Pokémon in the Fantasy Cup meta, and Shadow Waterfall Empoleon complements it by providing massive fast move pressure into Steel types that Giratina struggles with. Creator explicitly calls this a 'perfect core pairing.'

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *INSTANT 5-0* to start the Fantasy Cup with Waterfall Shadow Empoleon! | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Creator refers to being 'core broken' when both Excadrill and Giratina lack good matchups into Corviknight, implying they form the offensive core of the team. Excadrill handles steels and fairies while Giratina covers fighters and provides farm-down pressure with Shadow Claw.

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: IS EXCADRILL BETTER Than STUNFISK in the Fantasy Cup! Pokemon Go PvP   Trim

description: Stunfisk handles the steel mirror with ground moves while Forretress with Volt Switch covers Stunfisk's main losses to water types (Empoleon, Primarina) and fairies (Togekiss, Wheezing). Sand Tomb on Forretress provides additional steel-hitting coverage.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
sources.videoTitle: Best FANTASY CUP TEAMS AND POKEMON | Pokémon GO Battle League

description: Nearly perfect core — Giratina's ghost/dragon typing resists Steelix's fighting, fire, and water weaknesses. Only gap is ground, covered by a third teammate.

sources.author: MarckPoGoW
sources.videoTitle: TOP TEAMS for the FANTASY CUP and the ULTRA LEAGUE in POKEMON GO!

description: Double Steel/Ground back line that walls the steel-dominated meta. Both provide consistent ground pressure while resisting most meta threats, and Flygon's Sand Tomb debuffs soften targets for them to clean up.

sources.author: DanOttawaPOGO
